summary: The CR that ended the Oct-Nov 2025 shutdown funds the government until end of January 2026. Full-year bills passed for MilCon, VA, Agriculture, Legislative Branch. Another funding deadline is imminent around Jan 31, 2026.
content: From Wikipedia on 2026 federal budget: The deal revealed Nov 9 includes 'a continuing resolution that would fund the government until the end of January' plus full-year appropriations for MilCon, VA, Legislative Branch, Agriculture. The deal also bars OMB mass layoffs during the CR period and guarantees a Senate vote on ACA subsidies. The CR also rehires workers laid off during the shutdown with backpay.
